solo.warrior_dialogue1: I am talking to myself, because I am lonely.
solo.warrior_dialogue2: Wow, all this space to myself!

idle.warrior_dialogue1: This is my idle dialogue, because I am not doing anything.
I am still idle, but I need to say something different now.

generic_context.warrior_dialogue1: My name is John Dialogue, my mission: Produce Dialogue

generic_context.summoner_dialogue2: The power of teamwork is amazing!

puzzle_solved.hero_dialogue1: Now, that wasn't too bad was it?

start_boss.warrior_dialogue1: N-n-now hold on, we have to kill THAT?!

tutorial_combat_end.hero_dialogue1: Good work, newbie! You're better than you look!

tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue1: Your primary, secondary, movement, and special abilities are at the bottom left of your screen.
tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue2: Why don't you give them a shot?

tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue1: Alright, newbie, how 'bout I catch you up on the basics? Use the WASD keys to move, the space bar to jump, and E to interact.

puzzle_solved.hunter_dialogue1: Phew, never in my years have I missed having (easter egg)'s brain on my team.
puzzle_solved.hero_dialogue2: I believe you are one fine newbie yourself getting through that puzzle.

start_boss.hunter_dialogue1: Cannons for fingers? And I thought a metal arm was taking it too far.

tutorial_combat_end.hero_dialogue2: If I didn't know any better, I would mistake you for someone with experience!

tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue1: Your primary, secondary, movement, and special abilities are at bottom left of your screen.
tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue2: Why don't you take out your crossbow and give them a shot?
tutorial_room1_abilities.hunter_dialogue3: Aye, always a good idea to warm up before combat. I suggest you do the same, son.

tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue1: You ready? If you want to move around, make sure to use-
tutorial_room1_controls.hunter_dialogue2: The WASD keys to move, the space bar to jump, and E to interact, correct?
tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue3: Yes! You catch on quick, newbie!

puzzle_solved.hero_dialogue1: Incredible! You solved that almost as easily as me!
puzzle_solved.robot_dialogue2: My processors are state of the art, so that statement is unlikely.

start_boss.robot_dialogue1: Misuse of company property detected, cease your actions immediately.
start_boss.hero_dialogue2: All business for you it seems.

tutorial_combat_end.hero_dialogue1: That was quick! I see Mordred bots aren't to be trifled with.

tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue1: Your primary, secondary, movement, and special abilities are at the bottom left of the screen.
tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue2: Why don't you give them a shot, miss Mordred automaton?

tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue1: Don't forget you can use the WASD keys to move, the space bar to jump, and E to interact, newbie!
tutorial_room1_controls.robot_dialogue2: As a Mordred automaton, I do not need to be told basic information.
tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue3: You say that now, but don't get too full of yourself!

puzzle_solved.hero_dialogue1: Good job! You're pretty smart for a street urchin!
puzzle_solved.summoner_dialogue2: And you're just as egotistical as I thought.

start_boss.summoner_dialogue1: Great, another big ol' rattling fart to deal with.
start_boss.hero_dialogue2: I am not that old, newbie.

tutorial_combat_end.hero_dialogue2: That was a fierce horde; Good job taking them down all on your own!

tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue1: Your primary, secondary, movement, and special abilities are at the bottom left of the screen.
tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue2: Why don't you give them a shot?
tutorial_room1_abilities.summoner_dialogue3: Do you really have to explain everything?

tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue1: Alright, if you want to move, newbie, you better be using the WASD keys to move, the space bar to jump, and E to interact!
tutorial_room1_controls.summoner_dialogue2: Ugh, I know what I'm doing.
tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue3: Don't be so sure about that!

puzzle_solved.assassin_dialogue2: I told you I don't care for your compliments.

start_boss.hero_dialogue1: A mighty foe for us to slay!
start_boss.assassin_dialogue2: Can we dispense with these pleasantries and get on with our task?

tutorial_combat_end.hero_dialogue1: Amazing, it's your first dungeon run and you're clearing enemies out nearly as fast as me!

tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue1: Your primary, secondary, movement, and special abilities are at the bottom left of the screen.
tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue2: Why don't you give them a shot?
tutorial_room1_abilities.hero_dialogue4: Did you hear me, newbie? Should I repeat myself?

tutorial_room1_controls.hero_dialogue1: Newbie! Use the WASD keys to move, the space bar to jump, and E to interact! You can thank me later!
tutorial_room1_controls.assassin_dialogue3: This is going to be a long day, isn't it.

puzzle.hero_dialogue2: Use your brains to solve this one, not your brawn!

tutorial_combat.hero_dialogue1: Watch out, those foes have awoken!
